description: A maintenance superintendent reviews the backlog of open work orders to prioritize them and ensure the most critical work is done first.

nodes.task_description: Generate a report of all open and unassigned work orders from the CMMS.

expected_outcome.expected: A list of all backlogged work is generated.

nodes.task_description: Review each work order and assign it a priority based on its safety and production criticality.

expected_outcome.expected: All work orders in the backlog are prioritized.

nodes.task_description: Develop the maintenance schedule for the upcoming week, ensuring that the highest priority work from the backlog is included.

expected_outcome.expected: The weekly schedule is created, effectively managing the backlog and focusing resources on the most important jobs.
